technology.title: Anthropic cuts access to AI models over U.S. ‘national security’ order
technology.summary: Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals, even ones who work at Anthropic, from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over national security concerns

briefing.news_focus: Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals, even ones who work at Anthropic, from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over national security concerns
briefing.news_focus_zh: Anthropic在公開推出其最新的AI模型Fable 5僅三天後，因應美國政府的指令，宣布禁止所有外國國籍人士，包括其員工，訪問Fable 5和Mythos 5，理由是出於國家安全考量。這一措施凸顯了美國對於前沿人工智慧的監管日益嚴格。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家位於矽谷的AI公司，近期在美國的AI產業中扮演著重要角色。隨著AI技術的快速發展，國家安全問題日益受到重視，尤其是涉及外國國籍人士的技術訪問。美國政府的這一出口控制措施是首度針對特定AI模型，顯示出其對於AI技術潛在風險的高度警覺。此舉也反映了美國在全球科技競爭中對於保護本國技術的策略。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件中，Anthropic的行動顯示出美國政府對於AI技術的監管力度加大，尤其是在國家安全的背景下。根據參考報導，商務部擔心Fable 5可能存在的安全漏洞，這一擔憂促使政府採取了前所未有的措施來限制外國訪問。不同報導中，SCMP強調了這一措施的前所未有性，而Ars Technica則具體提到Fable 5的“越獄”風險可能成為國家安全威脅，這顯示出各方對於AI技術潛在風險的不同解讀。未來，這一政策可能會影響AI公司的國際合作與技術交流，並引發業界對於安全與創新之間平衡的討論。

supporting_titles: US blocks foreign access to Anthropic’s newest AI models over security risks
Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive
supporting_summaries: Washington has ordered Anthropic – a leading entity in America’s AI sector – to block all foreign nationals from accessing its latest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns, according to the Silicon Valley-based firm. The unprecedented export-control measure – the first to target specific AI models – came just days after Anthropic released the models, underscoring Washington’s increasingly hands-on approach to regulating frontier artificial intelligence...
Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

technology.title: AI sovereignty hawks see red as U.S. moves to block Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
technology.summary: While training Large Language Models is a prohibitively expensive undertaking, national security commentators have long warned of over-reliance on foreign technology in critical fields like AI

briefing.news_focus: While training Large Language Models is a prohibitively expensive undertaking, national security commentators have long warned of over-reliance on foreign technology in critical fields like AI
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國政府近期決定阻止Anthropic公司推出的AI模型Mythos和Fable，這一舉措引發了對AI主權的強烈反應。專家指出，對外國技術的過度依賴可能對國家安全構成風險，尤其是在關鍵領域如人工智慧。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，許多國家開始重視AI主權，擔心外國技術可能帶來的安全隱患。特別是在美國，對於依賴外國技術的擔憂已經成為政策討論的焦點。Anthropic的Fable和Mythos模型被認為具有潛在的安全風險，尤其是Fable 5模型可能存在的“越獄”問題，這使得美國商務部決定介入並要求停止相關模型的運行。
briefing.analysis: 此次美國政府的干預反映了對AI技術安全性的高度重視，尤其是在國家安全專家警告過度依賴外國技術的背景下。根據參考報導，Anthropic因應特朗普政府的指令關閉了Fable和Mythos模型，顯示出政府對於AI技術的監管力度正在加強。這一舉措可能會影響到AI產業的發展，尤其是對於依賴這些模型的企業和開發者而言，未來的技術創新可能受到限制。各方對於AI主權的看法存在差異，部分專家認為過度的監管可能會抑制創新，而另一些則強調安全的重要性，這一爭論可能會在未來的政策制定中持續存在。

supporting_titles: Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive
supporting_summaries: Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

technology.title: US blocks foreign access to Anthropic’s newest AI models over security risks
technology.summary: Washington has ordered Anthropic – a leading entity in America’s AI sector – to block all foreign nationals from accessing its latest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns, according to the Silicon Valley-based firm. The unprecedented export-control measure – the first to target specific AI models – came just days after Anthropic released the models, underscoring Washington’s increasingly hands-on approach to regulating frontier artificial intelligence...

briefing.news_focus: Washington has ordered Anthropic – a leading entity in America’s AI sector – to block all foreign nationals from accessing its latest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns, according to the Silicon Valley-based firm. The unprecedented export-control measure – the first to target specific AI models – came just days after Anthropic released the models, underscoring Washington’s increasingly hands-on approach to regulating frontier artificial intelligence...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國政府已指示人工智慧公司Anthropic封鎖所有外國國籍人士對其最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5的訪問，理由是出於國家安全考量。這一前所未有的出口管制措施是在Anthropic發布這些模型僅幾天後實施的，顯示出華盛頓對於前沿人工智慧的監管越來越積極。
briefing.background: 在全球人工智慧技術迅速發展的背景下，國家安全問題日益受到重視。美國政府對於涉及敏感技術的外國訪問者的監管愈加嚴格，特別是在人工智慧領域。Anthropic作為美國AI產業的領導者之一，其最新模型的發布引發了政府的高度關注。這一措施不僅影響了Anthropic的業務模式，也可能對整個AI產業的國際合作造成影響。
briefing.analysis: 這一出口管制措施反映了美國政府對於AI技術潛在風險的擔憂，尤其是關於網絡安全和黑客攻擊的問題。參考報導指出，Anthropic在發布Fable 5後不久即收到政府指令，禁止所有外國國籍人士，包括公司內部員工，訪問這些模型。這一決策可能會影響Anthropic的國際業務，並引發其他AI公司對於政府政策的擔憂。不同報導強調了安全性問題的不同面向，BBC提到的網絡安全和黑客攻擊的擔憂，可能是促使政府採取行動的直接因素。未來，隨著AI技術的進一步發展，類似的監管措施可能會成為常態，進一步影響全球AI市場的競爭格局。

supporting_titles: Anthropic cuts access to AI models over U.S. ‘national security’ order
Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
supporting_summaries: Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals, even ones who work at Anthropic, from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over national security concerns
Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, released publicly this week, sparked concerns about cybersecurity and hacking.

politics.title: G7 summit offers Trump, Modi chance to reset ties after US strikes kill Indian sailors
politics.summary: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war. US forces this week attacked three Indian-crewed vessels in the Gulf of Oman region, killing at least three sailors and prompting protests from New Delhi. Modi and Trump would likely want to contain the latest tensions and avoid derailing efforts to get relations back on track...

briefing.news_focus: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war. US forces this week attacked three Indian-crewed vessels in the Gulf of Oman region, killing at least three sailors and prompting protests from New Delhi. Modi and Trump would likely want to contain the latest tensions and avoid derailing efforts to get relations back on track...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 印度總理莫迪與美國總統特朗普可能在下週的G7峰會上會面，這是雙方在過去一年因關稅、巴基斯坦及伊朗戰爭等問題而緊張關係後的一次重啟機會。近期，美國軍方在阿曼灣地區攻擊了三艘印度籍船隻，造成至少三名水手喪生，並引發新德里的抗議。雙方領導人希望能夠控制最新的緊張局勢，避免影響改善雙邊關係的努力。
briefing.background: 近年來，印度與美國的關係因貿易政策、地緣政治及安全問題而變得複雜。特別是在面對中國的崛起及巴基斯坦的影響力時，兩國的合作顯得尤為重要。然而，雙方在貿易關稅及對伊朗政策上的分歧，尤其是美國對伊朗的軍事行動，對雙邊關係造成了壓力。此次美國的軍事行動導致印度水手的死亡，無疑加劇了雙方的緊張情勢，迫使兩國領導人必須尋求對話以緩解局勢。
briefing.analysis: 此次G7峰會上，莫迪與特朗普的會面將是雙方重建信任的重要機會。特朗普政府在中東的軍事行動對印度造成直接影響，可能使印度對美國的外交政策產生疑慮。印度政府的抗議行動顯示出其對國民安全的重視，並可能要求美方在未來的軍事行動中考慮印度的利益。此外，若雙方能在會議中達成共識，將有助於改善貿易關係及加強在安全領域的合作。然而，若無法妥善處理此次事件，可能會使雙邊關係進一步惡化，影響未來的合作機會。

politics.title: A deal with U.S. ‘has never been closer’, says Iran
politics.summary: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi’s comments came after Iran’s Mehr news agency, citing a source close to the country’s negotiating team, claimed that the deal would see “the release of $24 billion of Iran’s blocked funds during the 60-day final negotiation period”

briefing.news_focus: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi’s comments came after Iran’s Mehr news agency, citing a source close to the country’s negotiating team, claimed that the deal would see “the release of $24 billion of Iran’s blocked funds during the 60-day final negotiation period”
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗外長阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇表示，與美國達成協議的可能性從未如此接近。根據伊朗梅赫爾新聞社的報導，消息來源稱該協議將在60天的最終談判期間釋放240億美元的伊朗被凍結資金。
briefing.background: 近年來，伊朗與美國之間的關係因核問題和地區衝突而緊張。美國對伊朗實施了一系列制裁，導致其經濟受到重創。此時，伊朗正面臨內部壓力，急需解除制裁以恢復經濟。此次談判的背景是雙方在結束衝突的意願上達成共識，並希望通過協議促進地區穩定，尤其是在霍爾木茲海的航運安全方面。
briefing.analysis: 伊朗與美國的協議若成功，將有助於緩解地區緊張局勢，並可能促進霍爾木茲海的重新開放，這對全球能源市場至關重要。根據參考報導，雖然雙方已達成最終文本，但仍有關鍵步驟待完成，顯示出協議的脆弱性。不同報導強調了協議的不同面向，Al Jazeera提到的戰爭結束的可能性與BBC對霍爾木茲海重新開放的關注，顯示出各方對協議影響的不同解讀。各方利益關係錯綜複雜，未來的發展仍需密切關注。

supporting_titles: Iran war day 106: US and Iran say deal close but Lebanon fighting continues
Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
supporting_summaries: US and Iran say a deal to end the war is close, with a final text agreed but key steps still pending.
The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.

politics.title: ‘Right to protest genocide’ denied: Scotland’s Palestine Action supporters
politics.summary: As the banned group fights its proscription in London, similar battles are playing out in Edinburgh.

briefing.news_focus: As the banned group fights its proscription in London, similar battles are playing out in Edinburgh.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 蘇格蘭的巴勒斯坦行動支持者在倫敦面臨禁令的同時，亦在愛丁堡展開類似的法律鬥爭，試圖挑戰對其組織的禁令。他們主張抗議種族滅絕的權利，並希望能夠合法地進行示威活動。
briefing.background: 巴勒斯坦行動是一個在英國活動的團體，專注於支持巴勒斯坦人民的權利，並對以色列的行為進行抗議。該組織近期在倫敦被禁止，這引發了對言論自由和抗議權利的廣泛討論。蘇格蘭的支持者則試圖在當地法律框架內挑戰這一禁令，這反映出在英國不同地區對於抗議活動的法律適用可能存在差異。
briefing.analysis: 巴勒斯坦行動的支持者在蘇格蘭的法律鬥爭顯示出當地對於抗議權利的重視，與倫敦的禁令形成對比。這場鬥爭不僅涉及法律層面，還觸及了社會運動與政府政策之間的張力。支持者認為，抗議種族滅絕的權利應受到保護，而政府則可能基於安全考量來維持禁令。這樣的情況可能會引發更廣泛的社會運動，並促使政府重新評估對抗議活動的法律規範。

economy.title: Indonesia’s nickel rule changes are spooking Chinese investors
economy.summary: Chinese investors in Indonesia’s nickel industry recently sent a formal protest letter to President Prabowo Subianto. The message reflects their concerns over Indonesia’s political and economic direction, and the long-term trajectory of Chinese investment and Indonesia’s industrialisation programme will hinge on how Indonesia resolves them. The letter, submitted by the China Chamber of Commerce in Indonesia (CCCI), complained about a series of government policies, including proposed royalty...

briefing.news_focus: Chinese investors in Indonesia’s nickel industry recently sent a formal protest letter to President Prabowo Subianto. The message reflects their concerns over Indonesia’s political and economic direction, and the long-term trajectory of Chinese investment and Indonesia’s industrialisation programme will hinge on how Indonesia resolves them. The letter, submitted by the China Chamber of Commerce in Indonesia (CCCI), complained about a series of government policies, including proposed royalty...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國投資者近期向印尼總統普拉博沃·蘇比安托提交了一封正式抗議信，表達對印尼鎳業政策變動的擔憂。這封信由中國駐印尼商會（CCCI）發出，指出政府的一系列政策，包括提議的版稅，可能影響中國在印尼的投資及該國的工業化進程。投資者對印尼的政治與經濟走向感到不安，並希望能獲得更明確的政策指引。
briefing.background: 印尼是全球最大的鎳生產國之一，鎳資源對於電池和不鏽鋼等產業至關重要。隨著全球對電動車和可再生能源需求的增加，印尼的鎳產業吸引了大量外國投資，特別是來自中國的資金。然而，印尼政府近期對鎳產業的政策調整，包括提高稅率和版稅，可能會影響投資者的信心，並對該國的工業化計劃造成影響。中國投資者的抗議信反映出他們對政策不穩定性的擔憂，並希望印尼政府能夠提供更穩定的投資環境。
briefing.analysis: 中國投資者的抗議信顯示出對印尼政策變化的高度關注，這可能會影響雙方的經濟合作。印尼政府若能夠平衡國內政策需求與外資吸引之間的矛盾，將有助於維持投資者信心。另一方面，若政策持續不穩，可能導致中國資金撤出，進而影響印尼的工業化進程及經濟增長。此外，這一事件也反映出中國在印尼的投資策略面臨的挑戰，未來雙方如何協商解決這些問題，將成為關鍵。各方的立場差異在於，印尼政府可能希望透過提高稅收來增強國內產業，而中國投資者則希望維持穩定的投資環境以保障其長期利益。

economy.title: The SpaceX factor: Hong Kong stocks face liquidity test from mega IPO
economy.summary: This is part of a series on the global impact of SpaceX’s historic IPO, tracing how mainland Chinese investors’ strategies, the Hong Kong market and wider capital flows are being reshaped by Elon Musk’s trillion‑dollar rocket gamble. While the world witnesses a new fundraising record in the coming listing of SpaceX – and the emergence of its CEO Elon Musk as the first-ever trillionaire – Hong Kong stocks face a critical liquidity test, as market enthusiasm reshapes fund flows and recalibrates...

briefing.news_focus: This is part of a series on the global impact of SpaceX’s historic IPO, tracing how mainland Chinese investors’ strategies, the Hong Kong market and wider capital flows are being reshaped by Elon Musk’s trillion‑dollar rocket gamble. While the world witnesses a new fundraising record in the coming listing of SpaceX – and the emergence of its CEO Elon Musk as the first-ever trillionaire – Hong Kong stocks face a critical liquidity test, as market enthusiasm reshapes fund flows and recalibrates...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著SpaceX即將進行歷史性的IPO，香港股市面臨流動性考驗。這一事件不僅可能改變中國大陸投資者的策略，還可能影響香港市場及更廣泛的資本流動。Elon Musk的這一千億美元的火箭賭注，將使他成為首位千萬富翁，並創造新的募資紀錄，進一步重塑市場熱情和資金流向。
briefing.background: SpaceX的IPO被視為全球資本市場的一個重要里程碑，尤其是在香港這個金融中心。香港市場在過去幾年因政治因素和經濟挑戰而受到影響，但隨著更多交易的吸引，市場似乎正在恢復活力。此外，隨著中國大陸投資者對國際市場的興趣增加，香港作為資本流動的樞紐，其角色變得愈發重要。這一背景下，SpaceX的IPO不僅是資金募集的機會，也可能引發資金流向的重大變化。
briefing.analysis: 此次SpaceX的IPO對香港股市的流動性影響深遠，市場的熱情可能會重新調整資金流向。根據參考報導，隨著日本的SpaceX股票基金停止新資金流入，顯示出投資者對於此類高風險投資的反應可能會有所不同。此外，The Economist報導指出，香港正在吸引更多交易，顯示出其金融活力的回升，這與SpaceX的IPO形成了鮮明的對比。各方利益關係中，投資者希望從SpaceX的成功中獲益，而香港市場則需應對流動性壓力和資金流動的變化。整體而言，這一事件可能會促使香港市場在全球資本流動中重新獲得重要地位。

supporting_titles: SpaceX stock fund in Japan halts new inflows after investors pile in
Hong Kong is getting its financial mojo back
supporting_summaries: The hub is attracting more deals. And more Beijing-style politics

economy.title: UK vows to phase out Russian diesel and jet fuel imports by new year
economy.summary: The ban forms part of the government's package of sanctions on Moscow due to the ongoing war with Ukraine.

briefing.news_focus: The ban forms part of the government's package of sanctions on Moscow due to the ongoing war with Ukraine.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國政府宣布計劃在新年前逐步停止自俄羅斯進口柴油和航空燃料。這項禁令是針對莫斯科的制裁措施之一，旨在回應持續的烏克蘭戰爭，顯示英國在能源政策上對俄羅斯的強硬立場。
briefing.background: 自2022年俄烏戰爭爆發以來，西方國家對俄羅斯實施了一系列經濟制裁，以削弱其戰爭能力。英國作為主要參與國之一，已經在能源領域採取了多項措施，包括限制俄羅斯能源進口。柴油和航空燃料是英國能源需求的重要組成部分，因此禁止這些進口將對俄羅斯的經濟造成進一步打擊，同時也促使英國尋找替代能源來源，以減少對俄羅斯的依賴。
briefing.analysis: 英國政府的這項禁令反映了其對俄羅斯行為的強烈譴責，並試圖通過經濟手段來施壓。然而，這也可能對英國自身的能源供應造成影響，特別是在冬季需求上升的情況下。英國需要加速尋找其他供應來源，這可能會導致短期內能源價格上漲。此外，這項禁令可能會促使其他國家跟進，進一步孤立俄羅斯經濟。各方對此禁令的反應可能會影響未來的外交關係和能源市場動態，特別是在全球能源供應鏈日益緊張的背景下。
